Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'C:\\\\Users\\\\tomot\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\Microsoft\\\\WindowsApps\\\\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\\\\python.exe' -Argument 'C:\\\\Users\\\\tomot\\\\Desktop\\\\My_Brain\\\\notion_to_obsidian.py --yes' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\\\Users\\\\tomot\\\\Desktop\\\\My_Brain'
\\$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -Daily -At '22:00'
\\$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -StartWhenAvailable -RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable

" 2>&1)
